name: Crab-Stuffed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 6 medium (1 - 1 1/4 lbs) boned, skinless chicken breast halves.
2. For the filling, combine crabmeat, water chestnuts, bread crumbs, mayonnaise, parsley, and mustard in a bowl.
3. Place one piece of chicken, boned side up, between sheets of clear plastic wrap. Pound with a meat mallet until 1/8 inch thick. Repeat with the remaining pieces.
4. Spoon some filling onto one end of each chicken breast half. Fold in the sides and roll up.
5. Arrange the rolled chickens, seam side down, in a 12x7x2-inch baking dish. Brush with some Worcestershire sauce.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Brush with remaining Worcestershire sauce and sprinkle with sliced green onion.
Microwave Directions:
1. Prepare as above, except cook the chicken rolls in a microwave-safe dish covered with waxed paper on high power for 8-10 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Turn the dish over halfway through cooking time.
